title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
